title: Make Monday docs shareable via read only link
excerpt: Can you please allow Monday docs to be shared via a read only link.  Notion has a similar set up and you can publish the page and then share the link. I want to share proposal documents inside a deal board with potential…

posts.author: ytravelmedia (Caroline Anne Makepeace)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please allow Monday docs to be shared via a read only link. Notion has a similar set up and you can publish the page and then share the link. I want to share proposal documents inside a deal board with potential clients who are not in Monday. The export to PDF strips out the header image I have in the proposal and doesn’t look as good. Plus, webpage documents are so much better for all, rather than PDF documents.
